---
title: "About"
about:
    template: trestles
    image: assets/anthony-raborn.jpg
    image-shape: rounded
    links:
        - icon: bluesky
          text: Bluesky
          href: https://bsky.app/profile/raborndecisionsciences.com
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          href: https://github.com/raborn-decision-sciences
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/company/raborn-decision-sciences
        - icon: envelope-fill
          text: Email
          href: mailto:hello@raborndecisionsciences.com 
toc: false
---

Anthony Raborn is a psychometrician/statistician specializing in applied measurement, reproducible analytics, and custom R/Shiny decision tools.

My work combines psychometric methods, statistical programming, and practical software development to help organizations make clearer decisions from complex assessment and operational data. I strive to provide tools that make work easier to repeat, explain, and use for all levels of technical expertise.


## Education

University of Florida | Gainesville, FL | May 2019

PhD in Research and Evaluation Methodology, Minor in Statistics

## Areas of expertise

- Psychometrics and assessment analytics
- Item analysis, DIF, equating, standard setting, and technical reporting
- R package development, deployment, and reproducible workflows
- Shiny dashboards and decision-support tools
- Quarto reports and technical documentation
- Operations and break-even modeling

## Technical toolkit

```{=html}
<div class="ticker-outer">
  <div class="ticker-container">
    <div class="ticker-wrapper">
      <!-- Set 1 -->
      <span class="ticker-item">R</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Shiny</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Quarto</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">SQL</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Git/GitHub</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Winsteps</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">flexMIRT</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Mplus</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Python</span>

      <!-- Set 2 -->
      <span class="ticker-item">R</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Shiny</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Quarto</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">SQL</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Git/GitHub</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Winsteps</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">flexMIRT</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Mplus</span>
      <span class="ticker-item">Python</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Resume/CV

[Download consulting CV](assets/raborn-decision-sciences-cv.docx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
